objective: Run a single-variable scheduler experiment on the remote A40, replacing the linear learning-rate schedule with cosine while holding the five-epoch plain-Trainer setup constant.

commands.train: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@194.68.245.210 -p 22141 'set -e && cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && export SOLUTION_C_EPOCHS=5 && export SOLUTION_C_LR_SCHEDULER=cosine && export SOLUTION_C_OUT_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_cosine && export SOLUTION_C_SAVE_DIR=./outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_cosine/best_model && rm -rf "$SOLUTION_C_OUT_DIR" && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004 && .venv/bin/jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute solution_c_baseline_development.ipynb --ExecutePreprocessor.kernel_name=nlu-coursework-pod --output executed_solution_c_baseline.ipynb --output-dir experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004 --ExecutePreprocessor.timeout=0 2>&1 | tee experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004/stdout.log'
commands.evaluate: ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 root@194.68.245.210 -p 22141 'cd /workspace/NaturalLanguageUnderstandingCourseWork && mkdir -p experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004_probe && .venv/bin/python experiments/debug/solution_c_eval_probe.py --model-dir outputs/deberta_v3_baseline_plain_trainer_5ep_cosine/checkpoint-5380 --data-csv training_data/dev.csv --device auto --json-out experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004_probe/result.json --predictions-out experiments/runs/C_REMOTE_A40_004_probe/dev_predictions.csv'

notes: Single-variable cosine scheduler run completed cleanly on the remote A40, but the best checkpoint (epoch 4 / checkpoint-5380) regressed versus C_REMOTE_A40_003 on accuracy, macro_f1, binary_f1, and MCC. This closes the cosine-scheduler branch for now and keeps the linear-scheduler epoch-4 checkpoint as the canonical Solution C baseline.
